info.title: BluFiles API
info.description: BluFiles Management API - auto-generated from source code annotations

get.description: Returns the current server configuration. Requires an admin session token.

patch.description: Applies partial updates to the server configuration. Requires an admin session token.

get.description:
Returns server-wide usage counters for storage, files, folders, pastes, collections,
and shares alongside their configured limits. Requires an admin session token.

post.description: Authenticates with a username and password and returns a session token.
Creates a new user account and returns a session token. May be disabled by server configuration.

get.description: Returns a collection by ID. Accessible via a valid share link or as the owner.

patch.description: Updates the name or file membership of a collection.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a collection. The files inside are not deleted.

get.description: Returns all collections owned by the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a new empty collection for grouping files.

Creates a new file record. Supply either an `uploadId` from a completed chunked upload
or raw `data` bytes for small files. Optionally creates a share link in the same request.

get.description: Returns a folder and its contents by ID. Accessible via a valid share link or as the owner.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a folder and all files inside it.

patch.description: Updates the name or parent folder of an existing folder.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's root folder.

post.description: Create a new folder under an optional parent.

delete.description: Permanently deletes all collections owned by the authenticated user.
Permanently deletes all files and folders owned by the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's ID, username, and role.

delete.description: Permanently deletes the authenticated user's account and all associated data.

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's password after verifying the current one.

delete.description: Permanently deletes all pastes owned by the authenticated user.
Permanently deletes all share links owned by the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns all API tokens for the authenticated user, sorted with the current token first.

post.description: Creates a new named uploader API token for programmatic access.

patch.description: Regenerates a token by ID. Only applicable to uploader tokens.

delete.description: Deletes a specific token by ID, all tokens, or all tokens except the current session.

get.description: Returns a paste including its full content.

patch.description: Updates the name, content, or syntax type of a paste.

get.description: Returns all pastes owned by the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a new text paste. Optionally creates a share link in the same request.
Searches for files and folders using a query and optional folder ID

get.description: Returns all share links owned by the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a public share link for a file, folder, collection, or paste.

Initialises a multi-part file upload session and returns an upload ID.
Use the upload ID to push data chunks, then finalise by creating a file.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's top 10 files sorted by size descending.

Returns the authenticated user's current usage counters for storage, files, folders,
pastes, collections, shares, and tokens alongside their configured per-user limits.
Returns all registered users including their storage usage. Requires an admin session token.

post.description: Creates a new user account. Requires an admin session token.

get.description: Returns metadata for a file by ID. Accessible via a valid share link or as the owner.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a file and its stored content.

patch.description: Updates the name or parent folder of a file.

get.description:
Streams the raw file content with the appropriate Content-Type header.
Accessible via a valid share link or as the owner.
Returns share metadata and increments the view counter. Publicly accessible.

patch.description: Allows the owner of a share to update its password.

delete.description: Revokes a share link, making the shared resource inaccessible to anonymous users.

post.description: Appends a raw binary chunk to an in-progress upload session.

delete.description: Cancels and deletes an in-progress upload session.

get.description: Get info about a specific user and their storage usage/limits. Requires an admin session token.

patch.description: Updates the role of a specific user. Requires an admin session token.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a user account and all associated data. Requires an admin session token.
